s1.title: AN HOANG DIEN
s1.subtitle: Sale Executive

s5.title: Work Experience
s5.subtitle: 05/2025 Present | Song Nhac Trading and Service Co., Ltd | Trade Marketing & Sales Executive
s5.body:
Account & Display Management: Managed retail partnerships, optimized Display Share, and executed sales activities to hit monthly targets.
Reporting & Data Analysis: Prepared sales reports and assisted the Key Account Manager with trade marketing budgets and business reviews.
Trade Marketing & Digital Execution: Planned and executed promotional campaigns (e.g., major holiday sales), managed website SEO content, and developed social media marketing materials for audio equipment.
